lines.speaker: Okina
lines.text: So much blood flows through these lands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does the blood come from?

lines.speaker: Okina
lines.text: Throughout the generations, countless people of this land have perished in times of strife, with their bodies left to rot where they fell.

lines.speaker: Okina
lines.text: Some were slain by the deadly creatures that roam the land; others perished at the hands of their fellow citizens during the wars of this land.

lines.speaker: Okina
lines.text: Their blood flowed into the soil, pooling and percolating unseen in the dark, as the power of the Altar drew it to this sacred place to form the River.

lines.speaker: Okina
lines.text: The blood is the blood of Kourend's citizens. It is fitting that we honour their memory.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to enjoy the view.

lines.speaker: Enoch
lines.text: I see the river foaming with much blood.
